wikitext:
[]: The Evangelion Cast in Different styles Post by trkk-KAAN » Sun Mar 04, 2012 8:33 pm Can someone post a picture of the eva cast in dbz style? i really want to see them in dbz style please! oh and post in the characters in any style too!
